PreReviewGateCommand.docs: CQRS command for the pre-review gate check use case. track_id identifies the active track whose task-contract.json is evaluated. layer is the optional TDDD layer scope: Some(layer_id) checks only the given layer (per-layer mode); None visits the 6 canonical TDDD layer ids and combines outcomes for layers with readable signal documents (all-layers mode). Missing signal documents in all-layers mode are classified as no entries to verify; read/decode failures still fail closed. Both fields are domain value objects: TrackId enforces non-empty identity; LayerId constrains explicit per-layer checks to layer scopes that have <layer>-type-signals.json documents.

PreReviewGateInteractor.docs: Interactor implementing PreReviewGateService. Holds two injected secondary ports: task_contract_reader reads the task-contract.json for the active track; signal_reader reads per-layer impl_catalog type-signal documents. The interactor joins task attribution from the contract document with blue/non-blue classification from the type-signals document to produce a PreReviewGateOutcome. All fields are private (Arc<dyn Port>).

PreReviewGateError.docs: Error type returned by PreReviewGateService::check. TaskContractNotFound: the task-contract.json for the given track_id does not exist (gate short-circuits to MissingTaskContract violation). TaskContractReadFailed: I/O or decode error reading the contract; message is an opaque diagnostic string (R9: opaque infrastructure error message). SignalReadFailed: I/O or decode error reading per-layer type-signals document; layer is typed as domain::tddd::LayerId (R9: layer identifier is a constrained domain concept — the port takes &LayerId so the error always originates from a valid LayerId), message is an opaque diagnostic string. Gate violations (NonBlueSignal etc.) are NOT errors — they are data inside PreReviewGateOutcome::Blocked.

methods.name: check
methods.docs: Run the pre-review gate check for the active track. Returns Passed with a conformance summary, or Blocked with a list of violations.

PreReviewGateService.docs: Primary application service port for the pre-review gate use case. Called by cli_driver::task_contract::TaskContractDriver when handling TaskContractInput::Check.

methods.name: read
methods.docs: Read the task-contract.json for the given track. Returns TaskContractNotFound when the file does not exist; TaskContractReadFailed on I/O or decode errors.

TaskContractReaderPort.docs: Secondary port for reading a task-contract.json domain document. Implemented by infrastructure::task_contract_reader::FsTaskContractReader.

methods.name: read_signals
methods.docs: Read the per-layer impl-catalog type-signals document for the given track and layer. Returns SignalReadFailed on absent-file, I/O, or decode errors.

methods.name: read_optional_signals
methods.docs: Read the per-layer impl-catalog type-signals document when absence is an expected state. Returns Ok(None) only when the adapter can positively classify the document as absent (e.g. NotFound). Other read/decode failures must return SignalReadFailed. Used only by the all-layer iterate path of PreReviewGateInteractor::check (cmd.layer = None) to treat absent signal documents as no entries to verify while still failing closed on unreadable or malformed documents.

ImplCatalogSignalReaderPort.docs: Secondary port for reading a per-layer <layer>-type-signals.json document. Implemented by infrastructure::impl_catalog_signal_reader::FsImplCatalogSignalReader.

methods.name: new
methods.docs: Construct a PreReviewGateInteractor by injecting the two secondary ports.
